name: API & Entry
description: FastAPI application bootstrap and HTTP surface: app entrypoint (main.py), runtime settings (config.py), top-level workflow wiring (workflows.py), and DB package init that mount the agentic pharmacometrics service.

name: Agent Layer
description: LLM agent orchestration: the supervisor that drives multi-step pharmacometrics reasoning, the base agent abstraction, and the agent/tool definitions registry.

name: Tool Layer
description: Agent-callable tool implementations (PK model, NCA, BE, dose-proportionality, compartmental, poppk, report, regulatory, QC, review, data tools) plus the tool base/registry that bridge agents to the deterministic compute engine.

name: Compute Engine
description: Deterministic PK/PKPD numerical core: structural PK models, simulation/forecast, NCA (incl. steady-state), NLME (FOCE-I/SAEM/poppk), bioequivalence, dose-proportionality, dose-sweep, VPC, diagnostics, adversarial checks, and NONMEM export.

name: Core Orchestration & Infrastructure
description: Cross-cutting runtime services: the orchestrator, SHA-256 audit chain, background job runner, persistence store, LLM client, pharm-state, provenance/reproducibility, CDISC/exporters, schema extraction, skills, and logging config.

name: Test Suite
description: Pytest suite covering compute modules, API, orchestrator, audit/state, NLME, VPC, and the published-literature reference-validation tests (Theophylline) plus shared fixtures.

name: Infrastructure
description: Containerization and deployment: the multi-stage Dockerfile (builder and runtime stages) and the .dockerignore that package the backend for uvicorn-based serving.

name: Project Config & Docs
description: Project-level configuration (.env.example, ruff.toml, understand-anything configs/scan), dependency manifests (requirements*.txt), reference-test README, and the SQLite database artifact supporting the build and tooling environment.
